title: Submit a complete contact message successfully
description: A visitor can fill out the contact form with valid details and see the message delivered success confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a valid message
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the contact form is no longer shown as active

title: Show validation feedback when required contact fields are missing
description: A visitor cannot submit the contact form with required fields left blank and sees validation feedback instead.

steps.description: Submit the contact form without filling required fields
Verify the success confirmation is not visible

title: Open a project repository from a project card
description: A visitor can inspect a project card and open its code repository from the Projects section.

steps.description: Click the code link on the project card
Verify the project repository opens in a new tab

title: Open a project demo from a project card
description: A visitor can inspect a project card and open its live demo from the Projects section.

steps.description: Click the live demo link on the project card
Verify the project demo opens in a new tab

title: Open a certification credential from a certification card
description: A visitor can inspect a certification card and open its available credential link from the Certifications section.

steps.description: Click the credential link on the certification card
Verify the credential page opens in a new tab

title: Browse the portfolio sections from top to contact
description: A visitor can scroll through the homepage and discover the Projects, Certifications, and Contact sections in one continuous journey.

steps.description: Verify the Projects, Certifications, and Contact sections are displayed

title: Use the project card hover interaction
description: A visitor can hover a project card and see the card respond with its interactive visual state.

steps.description: Verify the project card shows an interactive hover state

title: Use the certification card hover interaction
description: A visitor can hover a certification card and see the card respond with its interactive visual state.

steps.description: Verify the certification card shows an interactive hover state

title: Reject an invalid email in the contact form
description: A visitor is prevented from submitting the contact form with an invalid email format and sees email validation feedback.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with an invalid email value
Fill in the message field with a valid message
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Browse content when a certification has no credential link
description: A visitor can inspect certifications and still browse the section even when a card does not offer a credential link.

steps.description: Inspect a certification card without a credential link
Verify the certification card is displayed without a credential link
